init_log.summary: Detected an iterative JavaScript ESM and Bash project from substantive runtime injection and launcher sources; verified ./verify.sh as the project test command and created the ec-init-owned project.yaml profile.

Refreshed SOUL.md from README, AGENTS.md, launcher and injector evidence with the ChatGPT Codex identity, Chinese dialogue standard, runtime evidence requirements, and concrete package/input/config prohibitions.

Regenerated RULES.md with mechanically checkable JavaScript ESM, macOS Bash 3.2, JSON, Markdown, encoding, comment-language, surface-guard, input-fail-open, and verification rules grounded in current files.

Regenerated ABSTRACT.md with named runtime, launcher, injector, configuration, verification, and documentation modules; documented the CDP data flow, verified runtime versions, dependencies, commands, and architecture constraints.

Created TEST_STRATEGY.md around the verified ./verify.sh custom harness, with deterministic checks, conditional live CDP diagnostics, manual UI/IME acceptance, tested and skipped classes, and change-to-verification mapping; project.yaml test fields point to the verified command.
Confirmed MEMORY.md, BUSINESS.md, TECHNICAL.md, SHORT_MEMORY_TEMPLATE.md, and all four short memories already use memory_schema 2; no migration procedure was required.
Confirmed memory/short and memory/long exist with all three long-memory files and SHORT_MEMORY_TEMPLATE.md; preserved all existing entries and created no fake memory.
Validated all five ec-init-owned knowledge/profile assets, parsed task.json, confirmed SOUL.md is 26 lines, reran ./verify.sh successfully, and prepared the project-init task for completion.
